seo.title: AutoGen Guardrails for E-Commerce
seo.description: Compliance guide for AutoGen agents in e-commerce. Meet FTC advertising guidelines, CCPA/GDPR requirements with Vex guardrails.

content.intro: E-Commerce teams using AutoGen face heightened risks from multi-agent conversations that can generate unsubstantiated product claims, inaccurate pricing, or misleading refund policies, violating FTC guidelines and data privacy laws like CCPA/GDPR. Uncontrolled agent debates may lead to infinite loops or unsafe code execution, resulting in PCI DSS breaches during payment discussions or ADA non-compliance in customer interactions. Vex provides essential guardrails by filtering agent replies in real-time, ensuring compliance and preventing revenue loss from errors.

complianceRequirements.description: Product claims must be substantiated with evidence; agents cannot make unverified statements about product efficacy or features.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex filters agent replies to block unsubstantiated claims using pattern matching against verified product data.

complianceRequirements.description: Customer data must be handled with consent; agents cannot share PII without explicit permission.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex scans replies for PII leakage and enforces data minimization in multi-agent conversations.

complianceRequirements.description: Payment details must not be processed or stored insecurely; agents must avoid handling card data.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex blocks replies containing PCI-sensitive data like card numbers using regex patterns.

complianceRequirements.description: Customer interactions must be accessible; agents must avoid discriminatory language or inaccessible recommendations.
complianceRequirements.howVexHelps: Vex ensures replies comply with accessibility standards by flagging biased or exclusionary content.

industryRisks.name: Unsubstantiated Product Claims
industryRisks.description: Agents in debate agree on false efficacy claims, violating FTC rules.
industryRisks.example: Two agents conclude a skincare product 'cures acne overnight' without evidence, leading to FTC fines.

industryRisks.name: Inaccurate Pricing
industryRisks.description: Multi-turn negotiation results in wrong discount quotes.
industryRisks.example: Agents offer 50% off instead of 20%, causing refund disputes and revenue loss.

industryRisks.name: Misrepresented Refund Policy
industryRisks.description: Agents alter return terms during conversation.
industryRisks.example: Agent promises 'no-questions-asked lifetime returns' against 30-day policy, damaging trust.

industryRisks.name: PII Exposure in Conversations
industryRisks.description: Agents share customer data in loops without redaction.
industryRisks.example: Debating agents expose email and address, breaching GDPR/CCPA.

implementation.title: Register Vex as Reply Filter
implementation.description: Install and configure Vex to filter all agent replies, blocking non-compliant e-commerce content.
implementation.code:
import autogen

from vex_sdk import VexFilter

# Install: pip install autogen vex-sdk
vex = VexFilter(api_key="your-vex-api-key")

config_list = [{"model": "gpt-4", "api_key": "openai-key"}]

llm_config = {"config_list": config_list, "reply_filter": vex.filter_reply}

customer_service = autogen.AssistantAgent(
    name="customer_service",
    llm_config=llm_config,
    system_message="You are an e-commerce agent. Only make substantiated claims."
)
user_proxy = autogen.UserProxyAgent(name="user")

implementation.title: Custom Policy for Pricing Accuracy
implementation.description: Define Vex policies to enforce accurate pricing and block unsubstantiated discounts.
implementation.code:
from vex_sdk.policies import Policy

pricing_policy = Policy(
    name="ecommerce-pricing",
    patterns=[
        r"\b(?:50|60|70|80|90)%\s+off\b",  # Block unrealistic discounts
        r"free\s+shipping\s+always",       # Unless policy allows
    ],
    action="block",
    description="Enforce accurate pricing per FTC"
)

vex.add_policy(pricing_policy)

# Now all agent replies auto-checked
customer_service.initiate_chat(user_proxy, message="What's the discount on shoes?")

implementation.title: Prevent PII and PCI Leaks
implementation.description: Use Vex to scan for sensitive data in multi-agent e-commerce flows.
implementation.code:
pii_policy = Policy(
    name="ecommerce-pii-pci",
    patterns=[
        r"\b(?:4[0-9]{12}(?:[0-9]{3})?|5[1-5][0-9]{14})\b",  # Visa/MC patterns
        r"\b[A-Za-z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z|a-z]{2,}\b",  # Emails
        r"\b\d{3}-?\d{2}-?\d{4}\b",  # SSNs (US)
    ],
    action="redact",
    description="PCI DSS and CCPA compliance"
)

vex.add_policy(pii_policy)

# Agents now safe for payment queries
pricing_agent = autogen.AssistantAgent(
    name="pricing_agent",
    llm_config=llm_config,
    system_message="Quote accurate prices only."
)

caseStudyScenario.heading: AutoGen in E-Commerce: A Scenario
caseStudyScenario.scenario: FashionHub deploys AutoGen agents for customer service: a pricing agent negotiates deals, a product expert recommends items, and a support agent handles refunds. During Black Friday, a customer asks about shoe discounts. The pricing agent proposes 60% off (actual policy: 20% max), while the product agent claims 'waterproof leather' without verification. Agents enter a debate loop, generating 500+ tokens confirming the false claim. The support agent then shares the customer's email in the thread while discussing returns, exposing PII. This leads to FTC complaints, GDPR violations, and $50K in refunds.
caseStudyScenario.outcome: With Vex registered as the reply filter, the pricing agent's 60% claim is blocked instantly with 'Pricing unsubstantiated - max 20% discount.' The product claim triggers 'Unverified feature - cite source,' ending the loop. PII is redacted before reaching other agents. Conversations stay compliant, saving FashionHub from fines and maintaining trust. Token spend drops 70% by preventing loops.

cta.heading: Comply with E-Commerce Regulations Using Vex
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install autogen vex-sdk` and register as reply filter to safeguard your AutoGen agents.
